case_title: RAMON ALBERTO GONZALEZ JAYME JR VS. JOSE ARMANDO CONTRERAS

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO DONNA HUGES - CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS AAA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2015 - JUDGMENT.
SUBPOENA RECEIVED **AFTER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT** SUBPOENA PARTY - DONNA HUGHES - CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, AAA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 FILED BY JAYME JR, RAMON ALBERTO GONZALEZ AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, JOSE ARMANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED JUL-08-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, JOSE ARMANDO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAYME JR, RAMON ALBERTO GONZALEZ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, JOSE ARMANDO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ERIC LEIVA. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
